Operation 'queryDetectionResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Query detection result status' is vague about what results are being queried. Description lacks clarity on input requirements (document ID format/source) and output details (what scores/metrics are returned). Added context about the workflow relationship with /detect endpoint and clarified that this retrieves analysis results from multiple providers. Improved terminology consistency with 'AI detection analysis results' and added actionable guidance for AI agents.

data.current_description: Query the status and result of an AI detection request by document ID. Returns AI detection scores from multiple providers.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status and AI detection analysis results for a previously submitted detection request using its document ID. Returns detection scores and confidence metrics from multiple AI detection providers. Use this operation after receiving a pending job ID from the /detect endpoint to obtain final detection results.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Query detection result status' is vague about what results are being queried. Description lacks clarity on input requirements (document ID format/source) and output details (what scores/metrics are returned). Added context about the workflow relationship with /detect endpoint and clarified that this retrieves analysis results from multiple providers. Improved terminology consistency with 'AI detection analysis results' and added actionable guidance for AI agents.

message: Operation 'checkUserCredits' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks context about authentication requirements, what the credit values represent, and when/why an agent should use this operation. Added clarity about credit types (base vs. boost), authentication context, and practical use cases for AI agents to understand the operation's role in the detection workflow.

data.current_description: Returns user credit details including base credits and boost credits.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's current credit balance and usage details. Returns base credits (standard allocation) and boost credits (premium allocation) along with total available credits. Use this operation to verify sufficient credits before submitting detection requests or to monitor credit consumption.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks context about authentication requirements, what the credit values represent, and when/why an agent should use this operation. Added clarity about credit types (base vs. boost), authentication context, and practical use cases for AI agents to understand the operation's role in the detection workflow.
